mnemonics: To Enqueue: Enter Queue, Enqueue a New Item
To Dequeue: Dequeue the Front Item, Queue is Not Empty
keyPoints: Introduction to Queues: A First-In-First-Out (FIFO) Data Structure
Queue Operations: Enqueue, Dequeue, Peek, and isEmpty
Queue Implementation using Arrays: Using Front and Rear Pointers
Circular Queues: A fixed-size Queue that can be accessed from both ends
Double-Ended Queues: A Queue that can be accessed from both ends, useful in certain applications
Priority Queues: A Queue where elements are ordered based on their priority
